subject: [PATCH pynfs v2 18/25] server41tests: test DELEGRETURN stops notifications

2026-04-16.patch_summary: This patch adds a test to the server41tests suite to verify that notifications are stopped when a delegation is returned using the DELEGRETURN operation. The test gets a directory delegation with ADD_ENTRY notifications, immediately returns it, and then creates a file from a second client. It checks that no callbacks are received after the delegation was returned.
